# Baseline Studio — Miami Event Production

> Baseline Studio is a full-service event production company based in Miami, Florida. Founded and operated by Saul, Baseline Studio provides professional DJ services, live sound engineering, LED video walls, uplighting, stage lighting, dancefloor effects, cold spark fountains, CO2 jets, dancing-on-cloud low fog, gobo projection, live musicians, and complete event production for weddings, corporate events, galas, quinceañeras, bar and bat mitzvahs, and private parties throughout South Florida — Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties.

**Website:** https://www.baselinestudiofl.com
**Phone:** (786) 302-6056
**Email:** Hello@baselinestudiofl.com
**Instagram:** https://www.instagram.com/baselinestudiofl
**Service Area:** South Florida — Miami-Dade, Broward, Palm Beach counties
**Pricing:** From $900 (DJ only) · From $2,500 (full production) · From $5,000 (complete studio buildout)
**Insured:** Yes — general liability insurance, COI provided to venues on request

---

---

## Services

### Entertainment
- **DJ Services** — Open-format wedding and event DJ. Pioneer CDJ-3000s + DJM-A9 mixer. MC service available. Music consultation included. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-dj)
- **Live Musicians** — Saxophone, violin, guitar, piano — solo or ensemble. Paired with Baseline Studio's professional sound system. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-live-musicians)

### Sound & Audio
- **Live Sound & Audio** — FOH engineer, line array systems, subwoofers, wireless microphone packages. QSC and JBL systems. Touring-grade gear, not consumer equipment. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-audio)

### Lighting
- **LED Uplighting** — Color-wash venue walls and pillars. Up to 20+ fixtures. Full RGB color control. Used for weddings, galas, and corporate events. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-uplighting)
- **Stage Lighting** — Moving heads, spotlights, and wash fixtures for stage and performance. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-stage-lighting)
- **Dancefloor Lighting** — Moving heads and intelligent fixtures above the dancefloor for weddings and parties. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-dancefloor-lighting)
- **Bistro String Lights** — Warm Edison-style overhead string lights. Priced per 50-foot run. Outdoor-rated. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-lighting)

### Special Effects
- **Cold Spark Fountains** — Indoor-safe cold spark sparkler effect. Two units standard. Used for first dances, grand entrances, and toasts. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-cold-spark)
- **CO2 Jets** — Vertical CO2 burst effect, 10–15 feet high. Used for dancefloor energy moments and countdowns. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-co2-jets)
- **CO2 Cannons** — High-volume horizontal CO2 blast on cue. Electrifying for dancefloor reveals. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-co2-cannon)
- **Dancing on Cloud** — Low-lying water-based fog effect. Stays below knee height. Used for first dances and grand entrances. Not a dry-ice fog machine. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-dancing-on-cloud)
- **Special Effects Package** — Combination of effects customized per event. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-fx)

### Visual & Display
- **LED Video Walls** — P3.9 indoor panels. Custom content playback, scenic backdrops, IMAG feeds, live switching. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-led)
- **Event Projection** — High-lumen projectors for large-format image and video display. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-projection)
- **TV & Display Screens** — Commercial display rentals for signage, slideshows, and presentations. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-tv-displays)
- **Gobo & Logo Projection** — Custom gobos — project a name, monogram, or company logo onto walls, floors, or ceilings. [Details](https://www.baselinestudiofl.com/service-gobo-projection)

---

## Pricing

All pricing is custom per event. These ranges are starting points. Final price depends on event duration, venue, equipment scope, travel, and crew size.

| Package | Starting Price | What's Included |
|---|---|---|
| DJ Only | From $900 | DJ setup, Pioneer CDJ-3000s + DJM-A9, 4–5 hour coverage, music consultation, setup/breakdown |
| Full Production | From $2,500 | DJ & MC, professional sound system, LED uplighting (up to 20 fixtures), wireless microphones, event coordination, setup/breakdown |
| Complete Studio | From $5,000 | Everything in Full Production + LED video wall + stage/dancefloor lighting + special effects + bistro string lights + dedicated production manager |

**Add-ons (priced separately):**
Cold spark fountains · CO2 cannons · Dancing on cloud · Bistro string lights · LED video wall · Gobo projection · Live musicians · Confetti cannons

Baseline Studio sends line-item proposals — no hidden fees, no surprise invoices. What's in the proposal is what you pay.

---

## Locations Served

Baseline Studio serves all of South Florida. Primary markets:

- Miami (Miami-Dade County)
- Miami Beach
- Coral Gables
- Brickell / Downtown Miami
- Aventura
- Doral
- Hialeah
- Kendall
- Fort Lauderdale (Broward County)
- Hollywood, FL
- Palm Beach area

Venues worked include: Ritz-Carlton Bal Harbour, The Bath Club Miami, The Biltmore Hotel Coral Gables, JW Marriott Miami Brickell, The Addison Boca Raton, The Carillon Miami Beach, The Alexander Hotel Miami, and others across South Florida.

---

## Event Types

Baseline Studio regularly produces:

- **Weddings** — Ceremony audio, cocktail hour, reception DJ, uplighting, special effects. Peak season October–April in South Florida. Book 4–6 months in advance.
- **Quinceañeras** — Full production packages including DJ, lighting, effects, and live musicians.
- **Bar & Bat Mitzvahs** — Custom production with MC, lighting, and effects.
- **Corporate Events & Galas** — AV production, stage lighting, LED walls, and live entertainment. COI provided.
- **Private Parties** — Flexible packages from DJ-only to full production.
- **Product Launches** — Stage setup, LED walls, live switching, branded gobos.
- **Charity Events** — Full event production with AV and lighting.

---

## Equipment

- **DJ:** Pioneer CDJ-3000 media players + DJM-A9 mixer
- **Sound:** QSC and JBL line arrays and subwoofers. Touring-grade, not consumer equipment.
- **Lighting:** LED uplights (RGB, wireless), moving heads, stage fixtures
- **LED Walls:** P3.9 indoor panels (high resolution, suitable for close-viewing distances)
- **Special Effects:** Indoor-rated cold spark units, CO2 jet rigs, CO2 cannons, low-fog dancing-on-cloud system
- **Backup:** Backup amplifiers, DJ controllers, mixers, and microphone receivers carried to every event

---

## FAQ

**Where does Baseline Studio work?**
All of South Florida — Miami-Dade, Broward, and Palm Beach counties. From Key Biscayne to Jupiter. Any venue within a reasonable drive.

**Is Baseline Studio insured?**
Yes. General liability insurance. Certificate of Insurance provided directly to venues on request.

**How far in advance should I book?**
For weddings during peak season (October–April), 4–6 months is recommended. Some November and December weekends book earlier. Summer events have more flexibility but last-minute bookings are handled case by case.

**What equipment does Baseline Studio use?**
DJ: Pioneer CDJ-3000s and DJM-A9. Sound: QSC and JBL line arrays. Lighting: LED uplights and moving heads. LED walls: P3.9 indoor panels. Backup gear is carried to every event.

**Does Baseline Studio bring backup equipment?**
Yes — backup amplifiers, DJ controllers, mixers, and microphone receivers are brought to every event. Equipment issues have never stopped a Baseline Studio show.

**Can Baseline Studio handle outdoor events?**
Yes. All equipment is rated for outdoor South Florida conditions — humidity, heat, salt air. Weather contingency plans are built into every outdoor event.

**How long does setup take?**
DJ-only: 1–2 hours. Full production (sound + LED walls + lighting + effects): 4–6+ hours. Setup time is coordinated with the venue so guests never see the process.

**Does Baseline Studio do custom packages?**
Yes. Almost every event is custom-quoted — line-item breakdown, no hidden fees.

**What's a typical wedding package?**
DJ/MC for ceremony and reception, ceremony audio, uplighting, setup and breakdown. Add-ons include cold sparks, string lights, musicians, or LED walls depending on budget.

**Why is Baseline Studio more expensive than cheaper options?**
Experience, touring-grade equipment, backup gear, and venue familiarity. Baseline Studio carries backup for every critical system. The difference usually shows on the night of the event — when it's too late to fix a problem.

**Does Baseline Studio require a deposit?**
Yes. A deposit holds the date. The balance is due before the event. Proposals are line-item breakdowns — no fine print, no surprise fees.

**Does Baseline Studio work with wedding planners and coordinators?**
Yes. Baseline Studio shares the run of show, aligns load-in with the venue, and stays in communication before the event. Planners don't need to manage Baseline Studio on the day.

**How quickly does Baseline Studio respond to quote requests?**
Custom quotes within 24 hours. Call or text (786) 302-6056 for same-day response.
